case_title: THREADGILL, JOHN ALLEN VS AHMADI, BAROO C/O ENGLISH & EUROPEAN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AHMADI, BAROO C/O ENGLISH & EUROPEAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY THREADGILL, JOHN ALLEN AS TO DEFENDANT AHMADI, BAROO C/O ENGLISH & EUROPEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THREADGILL, JOHN ALLEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AHMADI, BAROO C/O ENGLISH & EUROPEAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-14-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-23-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
